analyst_briefing: All domain autonomy scores recommended on hold due to insufficient sustained evidence for movement despite positive institutional signals. Key developments include EU Council conclusions accelerating NIS2/CER implementation (tech resilience) and calls for air domain countermeasures, but these remain episodic policy announcements without capability delivery. Russia shows clear increased hybrid tempo: attacks quadrupled 2023-2024, Germany-specific influence ops, and drone threats marked net_new/continuation for registry. No China/US/Turkey/Gulf signals; US-EU neutral. Flags to FCW (Russian FIMI on Germany), SCEM (hybrid-conflict nexus), GMM (infra sabotage macro risks). Weekly coverage thin on absences; monitor implementation gaps between EU rhetoric and structural autonomy per Lagrange equilibrium.
